html:
The Ham Bat is a Melee Weapon which deals 59.5 damage. It spoils after 10 days and has unlimited uses during this period. Despite being made out of meat, it cannot be eaten by the player or other mobs and will not anger a Bunnyman when in the player's possession.

The Ham Bat requires 1 Pig Skin, 2 Twigs, and 2 Meat to craft and an Alchemy Engine to prototype.

Downloadable Content

In DLCs the Ham Bat's damage will now decrease as the weapon spoils. The highest damage is 59.5 when fresh, and the damage decreases by about 0.37 per minute or 2.975 per day until it reaches its lowest damage of 29.75, just before turning into Rot. It becomes weaker than a Tentacle Spike after 2.86 days, weaker than a Battle Spear after 5.71 days, and on the 8.67th day, it's about as powerful as a Spear.

The Ham Bat will last longer when put into an Ice Box, Insulated Pack, Sea Sack, Chef Pouch and Snow Chester.

Tips

  • Having four spare Monster Meat, feeding them to a Pig (resulting in it turning into a Werepig) and then slaying the Werepig can result in the player receiving all of the necessary ingredients needed for crafting, excluding the Twigs. One alternative is to feed meat to a single Pig and select a neutral Pig as an attack target; this will cause surrounding neutral Pigs to become aggressive towards the player's Pig follower and kill it, causing it to drop resources.
  • The unlimited uses make it ideal for dealing damage to mobs and entities that don't fight back, like Spider Dens and Snurtles.
    • It is also an efficient weapon against Bosses due to their large Health pools.
  • It's more effective to craft the Ham Bat in Winter because during that season spoilage rate is reduced by 25%.
  • The Ham Bat can be crafted from spoiled meat and will be fully fresh when crafted. This makes it handy to be crafted right before a fight.
  • Player can use a Bundling Wrap to contain and preserve large amounts of Meat for indefinite time, allowing them to always have the possibility of crafting Ham Bats without the need of hunting for Meat beforehand

Trivia

  • The Ham Bat was added in the A Little Rain Must Fall update.
  • The Ham Bat makes an appearance as the Ham Shank in the popular online first-person shooter Team Fortress 2 to promote Don't Starve shortly before its release (along with the Wilson weave). It was awarded in Genuine quality to those who pre-purchased Don't Starve before April 23, 2013.
  • The Ham Bat was the second renewable melee-weapon in the game, after the Dark Sword.
  • Before the first "Bugfix/Performance" update, the Ham Bat used to be an edible Monster Food item and had 100 uses, in addition to spoiling over time.
  • A Ham Bat can be used as a Steam chat emoticon.
  • On the Reign Of Giants promotion picture for Winter, Wilson is seen cooking a piece of meat that resembles the Ham Bat.

Gallery

  • Wolfgang wielding the Ham Bat.
  • A Spider figurine by a Ham Bat.
  • Wilson's Weave along with the Ham Shank on the promotional banner for Don't Starve.
  • Wolfgang caroling with the default Ham Bat and the two Ham Bat skins.
  • Ham Bat in Terraria
  • Big Ham Bat in Klei Office
Tools and WeaponsCraftable Items

"hambat"
“This seems unsanitary.”
–Wilson
“Pleased to meat you!”
–Willow
“Is still good.”
–Wolfgang
“Death begets death.”
–Wendy
“TASTE IRONY AND DIE, FLESHLINGS.”
–WX-78
“I'm not sure this was the most efficient use of resources.”
–Wickerbottom
“What a waste of good ham.”
–Woodie
“An undignified weapon for a less refined time.”
–Maxwell
“Remarkably destructive yet still susceptible to food spoilage.”
–Wagstaff
“A weapön fit för the great dining halls!”
–Wigfrid
“An interesting way to use food.”
–Webber
“I can fight food with food.”
–Walani
“Mmm, ham popsicle!”
–Warly
“Made wit' metal from th'finest meat mines.”
–Woodlegs
“'TIS WEAPON 'O PIG BUTT”
–Wilba
“Twirly tail whacker”
–Wormwood
“Oh good. I was looking for a way to work on my swing.”
–Wheeler
“Good fer a smackin'.”
–Winona
“I'll bring it down with a mighty hamTHWACK!”
–Wortox
“Use meat for hitting? Never thought of that, florp.”
–Wurt
“Don't get any ideas, Woby.”
–Walter
“Well, the pig had it coming.”
–Wanda

One alternative is to feed meat to a single Pig and select a neutral Pig as an attack target; this will cause surrounding neutral Pigs to become aggressive towards the player's Pig follower and kill it, causing it to drop resources.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Hàm Dơi là Vũ khí cận chiến gây sát thương 59,5. Nó sẽ hỏng sau 10 ngày và có số lần sử dụng không giới hạn trong thời gian này. Mặc dù được làm từ thịt, người chơi hoặc mob khác không thể ăn nó và sẽ không chọc giận Thỏ Người khi người chơi sở hữu.

Never thought of that, florp. |walter = Don't get any ideas, Woby. |wanda = Well, the pig had it coming. |choose = walani}} __NOTOC__ The '''Ham Bat''' is a [[Weapon|Melee Weapon]] which deals 59.5 damage. It [[Rot|spoils]] after 10 days and has unlimited uses during this period. Despite being made out of meat, it cannot be eaten by the player or other mobs and will not anger a [[Bunnyman]] when in the player's possession. The Ham Bat requires 1 [[Pig Skin]], 2 [[Twigs]], and 2 [[Meat]] to craft and an [[Alchemy Engine]] to prototype. == {{pic32|Gift Icon}} Downloadable Content == In DLCs the Ham Bat's damage will now decrease as the weapon spoils. The highest damage is 59.5 when fresh, and the damage decreases by about 0.37 per minute or 2.975 per day until it reaches its lowest damage of 29.75, just before turning into [[Rot]]. It becomes weaker than a [[Tentacle Spike]] after 2.86 days, weaker than a [[Battle Spear]] after 5.71 days, and on the 8.67th day, it's about as powerful as a [[Spear]]. The Ham Bat will last longer when put into an [[Ice Box]], [[Insulated Pack]], [[Sea Sack]], [[Chef Pouch]] and [[Snow Chester]]. == {{Pic32|Prototype}} Tips == * Having four spare [[Monster Meat]], feeding them to a [[Pig]] (resulting in it turning into a [[Werepig]]) and then slaying the Werepig can result in the player receiving all of the necessary ingredients needed for crafting, excluding the Twigs. One alternative is to feed meat to a single Pig and select a neutral Pig as an attack target; this will cause surrounding neutral Pigs to become aggressive towards the player's Pig follower and kill it, causing it to drop resources. * The unlimited uses make it ideal for dealing damage to mobs and entities that don't fight back, like [[Spider Den]]s and [[Snurtle]]s. ** It is also an efficient weapon against [[:Category:Boss Monsters|Bosses]] due to their large Health pools. * It's more effective to craft the Ham Bat in [[Winter]] because during that season spoilage rate is reduced by 25%. * The Ham Bat can be crafted from spoiled meat and will be fully fresh when crafted. This makes it handy to be crafted right before a fight. * Player can use a [[Bundling Wrap]] to contain and preserve large amounts of [[Meat]] for indefinite time, allowing them to always have the possibility of crafting Ham Bats without the need of hunting for Meat beforehand == {{Pic32|Placeholder}} Trivia == * The Ham Bat was added in the ''[[Version History#A Little Rain Must Fall|A Little Rain Must Fall]]'' update. * The Ham Bat makes an appearance as the {{Plainlink|http://wiki.teamfortress.com/wiki/Ham_Shank Ham Shank}}in the popular online first-person shooter ''Team Fortress 2'' to promote ''Don't Starve'' shortly before its release (along with the Wilson weave). It was awarded in Genuine quality to those who pre-purchased ''Don't Starve'' before April 23, 2013. * The Ham Bat was the second renewable melee-weapon in the game, after the [[Dark Sword]]. * Before the first [[New Features#November 14.2C 2013 - Bugfix .2F Performance update|"Bugfix/Performance"]] update, the Ham Bat used to be an edible [[Monster Food]] item and had 100 uses, in addition to spoiling over time. * A Ham Bat can be used as a [[Wikipedia:Steam (software)|Steam]] chat emoticon. * On the ''Reign Of Giants'' promotion picture for Winter, Wilson is seen cooking a piece of meat that resembles the Ham Bat. == {{Pic32|Blueprint}} Gallery == Ham Bat Held.jpg|Wolfgang wielding the Ham Bat.
